_notes.version: schema 2.2 = workspaces layer + active-ws switch + slug scope per-workspace
_notes.workspace.default: Fallback workspace when no env/cwd-glob match.
_notes.workspace.auto_detect_from_cwd: If true, SessionStart resolves active ws via config.json.workspace_map glob.
_notes.workspace.create_if_missing: If true, switching to non-existent ws auto-scaffolds. Default false (fail-fast).
_notes.topic_layout.mode: file (default) | folder (only via /mem-promote when file > promote_lines).
_notes.topic_layout.max_depth: Hard cap on topics/<a>/<b>/<c>/. Deeper = anti-pattern.
_notes.slug.unique_scope: workspace (default) | global. Per-workspace lets 2 workspaces use same slug.
_notes.moc.preserve_manual: Block heading whose contents are NEVER auto-overwritten.
_notes.recall.cross_workspace: false = scope to active workspace + shared/. true = search ALL workspaces.
